audience_policies.source_phrase: 25 Evans Way, Boston, MA, 02115 Map 617-566-1401 Each pass admits up to 4 adults at $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
